name: Mushrooms Rice Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute sliced mushrooms and chopped onions in margarine until the mushrooms are golden brown.
2. Beat together eggs and softened cream cheese.
3. Stir in evaporated milk, cooked rice, chopped parsley, and salt to taste.
4. Pour the mushroom mixture into a 10 x 6 baking dish.
5. Bake uncovered at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 40-45 minutes, or until set and lightly browned on top.
